overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a rain-soaked neon-lit cyberpunk city at night. The character navigates crosswalks and sidewalks past futuristic buildings with prominent holographic advertisements and dense neon signage reflecting off wet surfaces.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection crosswalk with neon advertisements

events.description: character steps onto the yellow-striped crosswalk and begins crossing the rain-soaked street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across the wide crosswalk while rain falls and neon lights reflect off the wet asphalt

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with glowing purple umbrella walking in the opposite direction across the crosswalk

entered.detail: wide pedestrian crossing with bold yellow stripes and green walk signals projected on the ground
large building with prominent pink neon signage reading LADY POLYPOUT on multiple levels
tall glass and steel tower with illuminated windows and red accent lighting
tall street light with multiple lamps illuminating the intersection
orange metal railings separating the sidewalk from the street
wet concrete pavement with reflective puddles along the building edge

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-soaked cyberpunk intersection at night, with the character standing on a yellow-striped crosswalk. The Lady Polypout building dominates the right side with bright pink neon signage, while futuristic towers rise in the background. The character crosses the street alongside other pedestrians, including one with a glowing purple umbrella, as sparse vehicle traffic moves through the intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk beneath the Lady Polypout building with storefronts

events.description: steps off the crosswalk onto the sidewalk, entering the covered walkway area under building overhangs

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk beneath the Lady Polypout building, passing by illuminated storefronts and vending machines

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with red hair standing near a building entrance looking at the street

entered.detail: illuminated purple vending machine with glowing interface against the building wall
tall vertical neon sign with bright pink and blue lighting
building front with teal-colored panels and glowing window displays

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the street, the character now walks along the covered sidewalk beneath the massive Lady Polypout building. The neon signage glows intensely overhead while the street barriers run parallel to the walkway. A purple vending machine and vertical neon signs illuminate the left side as the character passes a pedestrian with red hair standing near an entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow urban corridor with industrial buildings and dense neon signage

events.description: enters a narrower street section with reduced building setbacks and tighter pedestrian walkway

agents.ego_description: navigating the narrower sidewalk past various storefronts, passing pedestrians with glowing umbrellas

notable_agents.action: pedestrian carrying a glowing neon umbrella walking toward the camera

entered.detail: industrial building with red neon sign showing number 24 and Japanese characters
constricted walkway between building facade and street barriers
bright pink neon signage running vertically along the building corner
dark brown industrial building with metal shutters and minimal lighting

segments.scene_description: The environment shifts to a narrower urban canyon with industrial architecture. The building with the red 24 sign dominates the left side, while the walkway becomes more constricted. The Lady Polypout building disappears from view behind the character as they pass a pedestrian carrying a glowing neon umbrella in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: open intersection corner with BD Shack restaurant and palm tree landscaping

events.description: character looks upward at the BD Shack signage and surrounding billboards while continuing to walk
approaching crosswalk as vehicles including a yellow taxi pass by on the wet street

agents.ego_description: walking while looking up at the neon signs and billboards, then approaching the intersection crosswalk

entered.detail: building with large red neon sign reading BD SHACK and fist logo, with red-lit windows
tall palm tree with fronds visible against the night sky near the intersection
wide open area approaching a major street intersection with multiple crosswalks
massive digital screen displaying advertisements on the building facade
overhead traffic signal with red light illuminated

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up to a wider intersection area featuring the prominent BD Shack building with its bright red neon signage on the left. Palm trees become visible as the character approaches the open corner. The character glances up at the signage before continuing toward the crosswalk where vehicles pass by under the red traffic light.

scene_state.functional_zone: large intersection with multiple digital billboards and yellow crosswalk stripes

events.description: steps onto the final crosswalk to cross the wide intersection with large digital advertisements overhead
passing under brighter billboard illumination creating intense colored reflections on the wet ground

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection while large digital advertisements and neon signs glow overhead, reflecting off the rain-soaked pavement

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with umbrella crossing the street ahead in the same direction

entered.detail: wide pedestrian crossing with bold yellow stripes crossing the multi-lane street
large digital advertisement for Kiroshi optics with distinctive branding
skyscraper with illuminated grid windows rising behind the intersection

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character crossing a wide intersection on yellow-striped crosswalks, surrounded by massive digital billboards including one for Kiroshi. The BD Shack building falls behind as the character moves toward the center of the intersection, with palm trees now visible to the left and a tall glass tower rising in the background. The bright billboard lights create vivid reflections on the wet pavement as the character follows another pedestrian with an umbrella across the street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-soaked cyberpunk intersection that gradually narrows into a dense industrial urban canyon. It begins with the character crossing a yellow-striped street beneath the towering pink neon signage of the Lady Polypout building, moving alongside pedestrians and a figure with a glowing purple umbrella. As the character reaches the other side, the perspective shifts to a covered sidewalk where intense overhead lights and a purple vending machine illuminate the path past a red-haired pedestrian. The scene then transitions away from the open intersection and the Lady Polypout building, moving into a more constricted walkway flanked by industrial architecture. Finally, the environment tightens into a narrow corridor dominated by a building with a red 24 sign as the character passes another pedestrian carrying a glowing neon umbrella.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a neon-lit street corner into the heart of a sprawling, rain-soaked urban intersection. It begins by opening up to a wider view of the BD Shack building, where bright red neon signage glows on the left as the character approaches a corner lined with palm trees. As the character glances up at the signs and moves toward the crosswalk, the perspective shifts to follow them past vehicles idling under a red traffic light. The scene then expands across wide, yellow-striped crosswalks, leaving the BD Shack behind while massive digital billboards, including one for Kiroshi, dominate the skyline. Finally, the camera tracks the character toward a distant glass tower, moving through vivid reflections on the wet pavement alongside another pedestrian carrying an umbrella.
